title: The Infinex yield vault is live
deployed_facts: A single vault routes deposits across multiple yield sources
Allocations rebalance automatically based on observed rates and risk parameters
Each rebalance is logged with the reason it was made
Users can read why every allocation change happened
Deposits and withdrawals settle to the same Infinex account that holds spot and perps balances
The vault is non-custodial; user funds remain under the user's passkey
headline: The vault is live.
subhead: One deposit. Multiple yield sources. Every rebalance comes with the reason it was made.
tier_reason: First Infinex product where the agent doing the work is legible to the user. The pattern — autonomous allocator + readable rationale — is the template for everything agentic that ships after. Reserved-template because the precedent matters more than the APY.
through_action: to make agent-driven allocation feel readable instead of opaque
lining: on the surface: a yield vault. underneath: the first time a DeFi strategy showed its work in the same surface where it traded.
